title: Pegasus Profile
description: Schema for the localStorage 'pegasus.profile' object and the snapshot export. Skills and the dashboard reference these fields by exact key — keep this in sync with dashboard.html .profile-field data-profile attributes.

resume.description: Local path or URL to resume PDF/markdown

interests.description: What you want to work on next (free text)

priorities.description: Comp floor, location, must-haves, hard-nos (free text)

examples.name: Avery Designer
examples.headline: Senior Product Designer · 8yr
examples.skills: Design systems, Figma, accessibility, prototyping, research
examples.targetRoles: Senior Product Designer, Lead Designer, Principal Designer
examples.priorities: Comp floor $200k base, fully remote US, healthcare or fintech preferred, no agencies
